lines.speaker: Jess
lines.text: Please excuse me, I'm rather busy.

lines.speaker: Jess
lines.text: I'd like a Wooden bed built.

lines.speaker: Jess
lines.text: I'd like a Wooden table built.

lines.speaker: Jess
lines.text: I'd like my clock fixed.

lines.speaker: Jess
lines.text: I'd like my bath fixed.
